{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Waiter / Waitress",
  "description": "At Genesis Group, we&#39;ve been living our dreams and redefining the world of hospitality for over three decades. Our journey has been characterized by excellence in a wide range of services, including Catering, Hotels, Restaurants, and Cinemas. With a team of over 10,000 dedicated professionals and 30 locations spanning across Nigeria and beyond, we take pride in delivering exceptional experiences to our valued customers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Waiter / Waitress
Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking professional Waiters and Waitresses to join our hospitality team.
	The ideal candidates will exhibit excellent customer service skills, poise under pressure, and a dedication to delivering memorable dining experiences.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet guests warmly, take accurate orders, and serve food and beverages promptly.
	Ensure table settings are impeccable and maintain cleanliness throughout service.
	Process payments accurately and handle cash transactions securely.
	Anticipate guest needs, upsell menu items, and resolve complaints efficiently.
	Collaborate with kitchen and bar staff to ensure seamless operations.
	Adhere to hygiene, safety, and alcohol service regulations.


Requirements


	Previous experience in hospitality or customer service (1+ years preferred).
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work flexible hours, including evenings, weekends, and holidays.
	Physically fit for standing long periods and carrying trays.
	Professional appearance and positive attitude.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief &nbsp;cover letter to:&nbsp;vacancies@genesisgroupng.com&nbsp;using &quot;Waiter/Waitress Application&quot;&nbsp;as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-10",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-02",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Genesis Group"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

      "addressCountry": "NG"

Waiter / Waitress Job at Genesis Group




        
    

        
        At Genesis Group, we've been living our dreams and redefining the world of hospitality for over three decades. Our journey has been characterized by excellence in a wide range of services, including Catering, Hotels, Restaurants, and Cinemas. With a team of over 10,000 dedicated professionals and 30 locations spanning across Nigeria and beyond, we take pride in delivering exceptional experiences to our valued customers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Waiter / Waitress
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking professional Waiters and Waitresses to join our hospitality team.
	The ideal candidates will exhibit excellent customer service skills, poise under pressure, and a dedication to delivering memorable dining experiences.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet guests warmly, take accurate orders, and serve food and beverages promptly.
	Ensure table settings are impeccable and maintain cleanliness throughout service.
	Process payments accurately and handle cash transactions securely.
	Anticipate guest needs, upsell menu items, and resolve complaints efficiently.
	Collaborate with kitchen and bar staff to ensure seamless operations.
	Adhere to hygiene, safety, and alcohol service regulations.


Requirements


	Previous experience in hospitality or customer service (1+ years preferred).
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work flexible hours, including evenings, weekends, and holidays.
	Physically fit for standing long periods and carrying trays.
	Professional appearance and positive attitude.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief  cover letter to: [email protected] using "Waiter/Waitress Application" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "Spar Market is a&nbsp;private indigenous company incorporated in 1984, catering services to various sectors in Nigeria. Being a pioneer in setting up organized retail, we are one of Nigeria&#39;s largest hypermarkets with a presence in various states of Nigeria. With the objective to promote investment by offering customers facilities on international standards in Nigeria, from being just a supermarket, we have evolved to be a multi-faced store addressing almost all possible needs of the consumer.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier
Job Location:&nbsp;Remote

Key Responsibilities


	Accurately and efficiently operate cash register
	Process payments made with cash, cheque, POS, credit and debit cards.
	Process returns and exchanges.
	Ensure all prices and quantities are accurate and provide a receipt to every customer.
	Prepare and raise invoices.
	Operate POS system
	Maintain cleanand tidy checkout areas.
	Follow the company process accurately and efficiently


Key Requirements


	Minimum OND qualification.
	1&ndash;3 years of relevant work experience in retail, preferably but not essential.
	Basic PC knowledge and familiarity with electronic equipment i.e. cash register, scanner, money counters.
	Strong communication and time management skills.
	Customer&rsquo;s satisfaction oriented.
	Attention to details
	Sales and mathematical skills.


Benefits


	Salary: 80,000 Monthly


Other benefits:


	HMO
	Leave allowance
	Monthly bonus
	Annual bonus.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;Ilupeju.hr@sparnigeria.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Cashier Job at Spar Market




        
    

        
        Spar Market is a private indigenous company incorporated in 1984, catering services to various sectors in Nigeria. Being a pioneer in setting up organized retail, we are one of Nigeria's largest hypermarkets with a presence in various states of Nigeria. With the objective to promote investment by offering customers facilities on international standards in Nigeria, from being just a supermarket, we have evolved to be a multi-faced store addressing almost all possible needs of the consumer.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier
Job Location: Remote

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Accurately and efficiently operate cash register
	Process payments made with cash, cheque, POS, credit and debit cards.
	Process returns and exchanges.
	Ensure all prices and quantities are accurate and provide a receipt to every customer.
	Prepare and raise invoices.
	Operate POS system
	Maintain cleanand tidy checkout areas.
	Follow the company process accurately and efficiently


Key Requirements


	Minimum OND qualification.
	1–3 years of relevant work experience in retail, preferably but not essential.
	Basic PC knowledge and familiarity with electronic equipment i.e. cash register, scanner, money counters.
	Strong communication and time management skills.
	Customer’s satisfaction oriented.
	Attention to details
	Sales and mathematical skills.


Benefits


	Salary: 80,000 Monthly


Other benefits:


	HMO
	Leave allowance
	Monthly bonus
	Annual bonus.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing Officer",
  "description": "Begi Clean Nigeria Limited being a subsidiary of Begi Group is focused on delivering professional cleaning services. As a member of CPAN (Cleaning Practitioners Association of Nigeria), Begi Clean Nigeria Limited is dedicated to redefining the concept of industrial, corporate and all levels of cleaning services leaving our clients with nothing less than greater value for money. Our experience in the cleaning industry spans over 20 years of experience, this we are bold to say has endeared our clients to us.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lawanson, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a smart, driven, and enthusiastic candidate to join our team as an entry level Marketing Officer.
	The Marketing Officer will support client acquisition, brand visibility, customer relationship management, and service promotion to help grow Begi Clean&rsquo;s market presence and client base.


Key Responsibilities


	Generate new leads and ensure conversion
	Support preparation of marketing proposals, quotations, and presentations
	Promote Begi Clean&rsquo;s services through social media and other marketing channels
	Conduct site visits (when required) to introduce services and gather service insights
	Support collection and analysis of client feedback
	Maintain records of leads, meetings, and marketing activities
	Prepare simple weekly and monthly marketing reports
	Support company events, trainings, and promotional activities


Qualifications / Requirements


	HND / B.Sc Degree&nbsp;in Marketing, Business Administration, Mass Communication, or related field
	1-2 years of experience in a marketing role
	Experience in the hospitality industry is an added advantage.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Basic knowledge of social media marketing
	Ability to use Microsoft Office tools (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
	Willingness to learn and work independently
	Smart, proactive, and professional attitude


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 per month.",

Marketing Officer Job at Begi Clean Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Begi Clean Nigeria Limited being a subsidiary of Begi Group is focused on delivering professional cleaning services. As a member of CPAN (Cleaning Practitioners Association of Nigeria), Begi Clean Nigeria Limited is dedicated to redefining the concept of industrial, corporate and all levels of cleaning services leaving our clients with nothing less than greater value for money. Our experience in the cleaning industry spans over 20 years of experience, this we are bold to say has endeared our clients to us.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Officer

Job Location: Lawanson, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a smart, driven, and enthusiastic candidate to join our team as an entry level Marketing Officer.
	The Marketing Officer will support client acquisition, brand visibility, customer relationship management, and service promotion to help grow Begi Clean’s market presence and client base.


Key Responsibilities


	Generate new leads and ensure conversion
	Support preparation of marketing proposals, quotations, and presentations
	Promote Begi Clean’s services through social media and other marketing channels
	Conduct site visits (when required) to introduce services and gather service insights
	Support collection and analysis of client feedback
	Maintain records of leads, meetings, and marketing activities
	Prepare simple weekly and monthly marketing reports
	Support company events, trainings, and promotional activities


Qualifications / Requirements


	HND / B.Sc Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Mass Communication, or related field
	1-2 years of experience in a marketing role
	Experience in the hospitality industry is an added advantage.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Basic knowledge of social media marketing
	Ability to use Microsoft Office tools (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
	Willingness to learn and work independently
	Smart, proactive, and professional attitude


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 per month.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "IT Administrator",
  "description": "Mogtech Group Limited is a holding company with different member companies operating in different aspects of the Nigerian economy. They include: Alkanes Petroleum and Gas Limited and Alkanes-Diaplous Limited (previously known as Alkanes Energy Services Limited). As a holding company, we provide top-notch shared services in Accounts/Finance, Human Resources /Administration, Legal services, Health / Safety / Environment and Internal audit for member companies, creating and maintaining quality standards across the group, both in terms of people, processes and procedures.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Administrator

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

Key Responsibilities
Network Management:


	Install, configure, and maintain network systems
	Monitor performance and ensure network availability
	Troubleshoot connectivity issues
	Implement basic network security controls


Systems Maintenance:


	Maintain computers, servers, and software systems
	Perform updates, patches, and regular backups
	Diagnose and resolve hardware/software issues
	Ensure minimal downtime and system efficiency


Website &amp; Hosting Management:


	Manage and update company website content
	Oversee domain registration and hosting services
	Monitor website performance, uptime, and security
	Liaise with hosting providers and developers when required


Email Systems Administration:


	Set up and manage company email accounts
	Administer email platforms (e.g., Microsoft 365, Google Workspace)
	Ensure email security, spam filtering, and data protection
	Troubleshoot email delivery, access, and configuration issues Website Management



	Update and maintain company website content


IT Infrastructure Management:


	Oversee IT equipment, software, and tools
	Maintain IT asset register and documentation
	Recommend and implement improvements where needed


IT Security:


	Implement and maintain basic IT security measures
	Monitor systems for risks or vulnerabilities
	Manage antivirus, access controls, and data protection
	Ensure regular backups and support disaster recovery readiness
	Promote cybersecurity awareness among staff


Technical Support:


	Provide day-to-day IT support to staff
	Resolve technical issues promptly
	Guide users on proper use of IT systems and tools


Person Specification


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in IT, Computer Science, or related field
	2&ndash;5 years of relevant IT experience
	Experience in a small or growing organization is an advantage


Technical Skills:


	Knowledge of network setup and troubleshooting
	Systems maintenance (hardware and software)
	Website/CMS management
	Basic IT security practices (firewalls, antivirus, backups)
	Familiarity with cloud tools is an advantage


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Strong problem-solving ability
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks
	Good communication skills (especially with non-technical users)
	Good time management and prioritization


Behavioural Attributes:


	High level of integrity and responsibility
	Detail-oriented and organized
	Service-oriented and approachable
	Proactive and willing to learn.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@mogtech-group.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

IT Administrator Job at Mogtech Group Limited




        
    

        
        Mogtech Group Limited is a holding company with different member companies operating in different aspects of the Nigerian economy. They include: Alkanes Petroleum and Gas Limited and Alkanes-Diaplous Limited (previously known as Alkanes Energy Services Limited). As a holding company, we provide top-notch shared services in Accounts/Finance, Human Resources /Administration, Legal services, Health / Safety / Environment and Internal audit for member companies, creating and maintaining quality standards across the group, both in terms of people, processes and procedures.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Administrator

Job Location: Lagos
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Key Responsibilities
Network Management:


	Install, configure, and maintain network systems
	Monitor performance and ensure network availability
	Troubleshoot connectivity issues
	Implement basic network security controls


Systems Maintenance:


	Maintain computers, servers, and software systems
	Perform updates, patches, and regular backups
	Diagnose and resolve hardware/software issues
	Ensure minimal downtime and system efficiency


Website & Hosting Management:


	Manage and update company website content
	Oversee domain registration and hosting services
	Monitor website performance, uptime, and security
	Liaise with hosting providers and developers when required


Email Systems Administration:


	Set up and manage company email accounts
	Administer email platforms (e.g., Microsoft 365, Google Workspace)
	Ensure email security, spam filtering, and data protection
	Troubleshoot email delivery, access, and configuration issues Website Management



	Update and maintain company website content


IT Infrastructure Management:


	Oversee IT equipment, software, and tools
	Maintain IT asset register and documentation
	Recommend and implement improvements where needed


IT Security:


	Implement and maintain basic IT security measures
	Monitor systems for risks or vulnerabilities
	Manage antivirus, access controls, and data protection
	Ensure regular backups and support disaster recovery readiness
	Promote cybersecurity awareness among staff


Technical Support:


	Provide day-to-day IT support to staff
	Resolve technical issues promptly
	Guide users on proper use of IT systems and tools


Person Specification


	Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, or related field
	2–5 years of relevant IT experience
	Experience in a small or growing organization is an advantage


Technical Skills:


	Knowledge of network setup and troubleshooting
	Systems maintenance (hardware and software)
	Website/CMS management
	Basic IT security practices (firewalls, antivirus, backups)
	Familiarity with cloud tools is an advantage


Skills & Competencies:


	Strong problem-solving ability
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks
	Good communication skills (especially with non-technical users)
	Good time management and prioritization


Behavioural Attributes:


	High level of integrity and responsibility
	Detail-oriented and organized
	Service-oriented and approachable
	Proactive and willing to learn.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
